item.description: Buzzzz, do you hear that? The bees are out collecting nectar to make honey. Follow the trail around Staveley and become a bee for the day.

item.title: Stockeld Summer
item.description: Join us from 18th July until 6th September for a festival-themed summer - see live performers every day, including music acts, magicians and more! Plus, epic family outdoor activities to make this your best summer day out yet!
item.location: Stockeld Park, Wetherby
item.ify:location: Stockeld Park, Wetherby

item.title: Header Menu
item.description: We hold various fun and educational events every school holiday ! Whether you enjoy getting hands-on with science or listening to fascinating ocean talks, there's always something new to learn with every visit and for all ages.

item.ify:location: The Deep, Hull

item.title: Door 43's Festival of Wellbeing
item.description: This summer, Door 43 is bringing the good vibes to Sheffield city centre with the launch of the Festival of Wellbeing, a free summer programme packed with workshops, activities and events for young people aged 13-25
item.location: Free
item.ify:location: Free
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: Summer Holiday Activities at Sheffield Manor Lodge – Week 1
item.description: Come along to Sheffield Manor Lodge during the first week of the summer holidays and enjoy fun garden-themed craft and trail activities!
item.location: Tickets are £5 per child taking part in activities.
item.ify:location: Tickets are £5 per child taking part in activities.
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: Matthew Bourne's The Car Man
item.description: Fasten your seat belts. Matthew Bourne’s award-winning The Car Man is back! Loosely based on Bizet’s ever-popular opera, The Car Man has one of the most thrilling and instantly recognisable scores in New Adventures’ repertoire.
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: I Saw the TV Glow
item.description: Teenager Owen is just trying to make it through life in the suburbs when his classmate introduces him to a mysterious late-night TV show — a vision of a supernatural world beneath their own.
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: Park Hill Tours - Walk the Streets in the Sky
item.description: Explore a brutalist icon and its bold reinvention
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: Superbugs!
item.description: Something strange is happening in the woods! Join Professor Bug’s Superbug training to go on bug hunts, build giant webs, create superbug disguises, and help bring the buzz back to the woodland.
item.location: £8.00/child (adults and siblings 2 and under go free)
item.ify:location: £8.00/child (adults and siblings 2 and under go free)
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: Summer of Play at Wentworth Castle Gardens

item.title: Summer River Workshops at Rowntree Park
item.description: Join sculptor and ceramicist Sarah Schiewe for a creative, family-friendly clay workshop inspired by York’s rivers, flooding history, and climate resilience. In this hands-on workshop, participants will create their own unique air-dry clay fish — a “river messenger” carrying stories, memories, and imagined journeys fro

item.title: Tom Jones
item.description: Tom Jones + STONE FOUNDATION Music icon Tom Jones has announced his return to Halifax this summer for a huge outdoor headline show as part of his 2026 Come Gather Round tour. The legendary Welsh singer will take to the stage at TK Maxx Presents Live at The Piece Hall on Saturday 25 July. He... \n

item.title: Halloween at Stockeld Park
item.description: Celebrate spooky season at Stockeld Park! With Woodland Witches, a home-grown Pumpkin Patch, magical forest trail, Zombie Laser, and the monster Maze, you're in for a day of skele-fun this Halloween!
item.location: Stockeld Park, Wetherby
item.ify:location: Stockeld Park, Wetherby
item.dc:creator: Stockeld Park

item.title: The Christmas Adventure
item.description: Explore North Pole Street and hop in the Enchanted Elevator to meet Santa in our immersive Grotto, take a spin on our Ice Rink, explore the Enchanted Forest, playgrounds, maze, and illuminations, and more this Christmas at Stockeld!
item.location: Stockeld Park, Wetherby
item.ify:location: Stockeld Park, Wetherby
item.dc:creator: Stockeld Park

item.title: Betfred 250th St Leger Festival | St Leger Day
item.description: The most historic race. The most historic party. Celebrating 250 Years of the World's Oldest Classic 2026 marks a huge milestone in British racing history, the 250th anniversary of the first running of the Betfred St Leger Stakes, which first took place all the way back in 1776. Capital Breakfast host DJ Jordan North w
item.location: Doncaster Racecourse, The Grandstand Leger Way, Doncaster, South Yorkshire, DN2 6BB
